description_long: This is a large, L-shaped sectional sofa with a modern design, featuring a combination of light-colored seat and back cushions contrasted against a darker base and armrests. The sofa is composed of six main seating sections, each with plush, tufted cushions that appear thick and comfortable. The backrest is high and segmented, providing ample support along the entire length of the sofa, and the armrests are present at both ends, with a slightly rounded, padded profile. The upholstery appears to be a soft fabric for the cushions and a more durable, possibly synthetic material for the base and sides. The sofa sits low to the ground, with the legs either recessed or hidden from view, giving it a grounded, monolithic appearance. This piece would be suitable for communal urban spaces, such as lobbies, lounges, or large living areas.
description: A large, L-shaped sectional sofa with plush, tufted light cushions and a contrasting dark base, featuring high segmented backrests and padded armrests.
description_view_0: The sofa's L-shape and full seating arrangement are clearly visible, showing the plush cushions and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the depth of the seat and the thickness of the backrest, with one armrest visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, high backrest and the solid, dark base with no visible legs.
description_view_3: Opposite angle of the L-shape, showing the sectional layout and the other armrest, with all seat cushions visible.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Six individual seat cushions and six matching back cushions, all tufted and attached, arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout with uniform size and spacing.
attribute_armrest_style: Both ends feature padded, straight-profile armrests at seat height, with a slightly rounded top and no decorative elements, matching the dark base material.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are not visible, suggesting a recessed or hidden support structure integrated into the dark base, giving a low-profile, grounded appearance.
attribute_backrest_type: High, segmented backrest with attached, tufted cushions, continuous along the sectional curve, providing full back support.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Upholstery is solid in color with a smooth, matte finish; cushions are tufted, adding subtle texture and visual interest without any visible decorative stitching or patterns.
